message:
✨ Enable kubeconfig import in Add Cluster dialog (#1375)

Wire up the Import Kubeconfig tab with:
- Paste textarea and file upload for kubeconfig YAML
- Preview step showing new vs existing contexts
- Import with success/error feedback
- Calls kc-agent /kubeconfig/preview and /kubeconfig/import endpoints

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
